---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Escapes"
date: 2020-09-12
trailer: "gallery/escapes/preview/ff_12_3_4_22.png"
splash:
  image: "gallery/escapes/image/ff_12_3_4_22.png"
  caption: "Escapes"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
